name: Marinated Spicy Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all fat off the meat and cut into 1/4 inch thick strips.
2. Mix salt, pepper, chili powder, garlic powder, onion powder, cayenne pepper, liquid smoke, water, soy sauce, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl until well combined.
3. Add the meat to the marinade and cover. Let it marinate overnight at room temperature.
4. Remove the meat from the marinade and pat dry thoroughly with paper towels.
5. Line a cookie sheet with foil and arrange the meat on it in a single layer, ensuring no overlap.
6. Dry the meat in an oven set to 175°F (for 6 hours or more), turning the strips after 3 hours for even drying.
7. Cool the jerky completely before packaging in airtight bags.
